title: Warfare
description: This comprehensive warfare experience transforms your world into a tactical battlefield featuring a wide array of modern firearms, heavy artillery, and drivable military vehicles. Engage in high-stakes combat with realistic ballistics, advanced defence..
body: This comprehensive warfare experience transforms your world into a tactical battlefield featuring a wide array of modern firearms, heavy artillery, and drivable military vehicles. Engage in high-stakes combat with realistic ballistics, advanced base defense systems, and immersive environmental changes designed for both solo survival and multiplayer conquest. Strategize your approach using diverse equipment and fortified structures to dominate the landscape in an all-out war for territory and resources.
